(a) The cost of lighting improvements made without a petition by property owners shall be paid by the municipality out of the municipality’s available money.

markdown:
# Transp. Code
## Title 6
### Chapter 315. Artificial Lighting
##### § 315.075 — Payment from Available Money

(a) The cost of lighting improvements made without a petition by property owners shall be paid by the municipality out of the municipality’s available money.

(b) The amount paid by a municipality to a contractor under this section shall be reimbursed to the municipality by assessments against abutting property owners under this chapter.

*Acts 1995, 74th Leg., ch. 165, Sec. 1, eff. Sept. 1, 1995.*

subsections.label: a
subsections.text: The cost of lighting improvements made without a petition by property owners shall be paid by the municipality out of the municipality’s available money.

subsections.label: b
subsections.text: The amount paid by a municipality to a contractor under this section shall be reimbursed to the municipality by assessments against abutting property owners under this chapter.
